exclusions: Equipment and Services Covered by Section 2 of The Secure Networks Act
restrictions: Individuals who are citizens of the Democratic People’s Republic of North Korea, the People’s Republic of China, the Russian Federation, or the Islamic Republic of Iran may not serve as Senior/Key Personnel.

funding.indirect_cost_rule: NSF will follow the standard indirect cost rate for universities and other organizations.

timeline.event: Data Management and Privacy Plan submission

requirements.description: Written Proposals should be direct, concise, and not exceed 8 single-sided pages exclusive of the Conflicts of Interest statement.
